assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: The plan's 'Branch Operations' section states: 'Check out the target branch (TC-9005): git checkout TC-9005, git pull'. The target branch is explicitly TC-9005, not main.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: The plan's 'PR Creation' section shows: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column"'. The --base flag targets TC-9005, not main.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: The plan states: 'Create the task branch: git checkout -b TC-9205' and explicitly clarifies: 'The task branch is named after the Jira issue ID (TC-9205), per constraint 3.1. This is distinct from the target branch name (TC-9005).'

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: The plan's 'Pre-Implementation Inspection' section lists 3 files to inspect: (1) migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, (2) migration/src/lib.rs, (3) entity/src/advisory.rs. All three are mentioned with detailed inspection goals.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: The plan states: 'The commit would be executed with `--trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code"` per constraint 2.3:' followed by the command 'git commit --trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code" -m "feat(migration): ..."'.

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: The commit message is 'feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column' which follows Conventional Commits format with type 'feat', scope 'migration', and a description. The footer contains 'Implements TC-9205'.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: The plan has a dedicated '## Target Branch' section stating: '**TC-9005** (extracted from the task description's Target Branch section). This is the parent feature branch, not `main`.'
